title: Verizon, Intel and Dow stocks are the biggest ‘dogs' of the Dow as 2022 ends
text: The stocks of Verizon Communications Inc. VZ, -0.27% , Intel Corp. INTC, -0.32% and Dow Inc. DOW, -0.81% are the biggest “dogs” of the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, -0.88% as 2022 comes to an end. A Wall Street trading strategy known as “Dogs of the Dow” calls for the buying of the top-10 highest yielding stocks in the Dow industrials at the close of the last trading day of each year.

title: Dow, S&P 500 and Nasdaq open higher as results from FedEx and Nike bring some cheer
text: 9.35am: Stocks buoyed by Nike, FedEx earnings US stocks started Wednesday in the green as earnings from Nike and FedEx were well-received by investors.
